description_long: This is an L-shaped, freestanding shelving unit with a modern, minimalist design. The structure is composed of a series of open horizontal shelves on one side, providing ample storage space for books, files, or decorative items. The other side features two large, rectangular door panels, likely concealing additional storage compartments. The exterior is finished in a uniform, warm brown color, suggesting a wood or laminate material. The surfaces are flat and smooth, with sharp, clean edges and no visible hardware or handles. The overall form is robust and functional, suitable for use in offices, lobbies, or public urban interiors.
description: A modern L-shaped brown shelving unit with open shelves and two large door panels, featuring a smooth, minimalist finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large rectangular door panels and the solid side of the L-shape.
description_view_1: Side view revealing four open horizontal shelves and the depth of the shelving unit.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a solid, featureless back panel of the unit.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid side of the L-shape with no visible shelves or doors.
